action.reasoning: Observation: XLS-R codec-augmented run performed much worse than the current WavLM codec checkpoint (hidden EER 0.3378 vs best 0.2538), while WavLM continuation and clean+codec ensemble also worsened. Analysis: best remains checkpoints/best_codec.pt. With 7 iterations and ample time, the next promising path is a targeted WavLM variant rather than another backbone: inspect current model/training code to identify whether it uses only last-layer mean pooling and whether we can add robust pooling/layer mixing or inference-time codec augmentation without retraining. Decision: inspect the compact relevant sections of model.py, train.py, and predict.py plus checkpoint metadata before patching a low-risk inference/training variant.
